title: Are Claude models broken with the Fable 5 update?
abstract: Fable 5 is back (for a week) but I just noticed that all the Claude models suddenly are failing with all the Tools ( search, fetch, read, write). Anyone else experienced the same?
abstract_zh: Fable 5 又回来了（一周时间），但我刚刚发现所有 Claude 模型突然都无法使用所有工具（搜索、检索、阅读、编写）。其他人也有同样的问题吗？
